entry.name: folderPath
entry.label: Folder path
entry.whatsthis: Path to the folder to display. Use ~ for home directory (e.g., ~/Downloads). Default: ~/Downloads

entry.name: maxItems
entry.label: Maximum items to display
entry.whatsthis: Maximum number of items to display in the list

entry.name: rotationStep
entry.label: Rotation step (degrees)
entry.whatsthis: Rotation step in degrees for each item (progressive rotation)

entry.name: iconSize
entry.label: Icon size
entry.whatsthis: Size of icons in the item list

entry.name: indentStep
entry.label: Indent step
entry.whatsthis: Progressive indentation step in pixels for each item
